adjusted.reasoning: France won all three group games conceding just two, and are tournament favourites; Sweden scraped through. Market (-330) is clear; I trim the model's 96% only for knockout variance. France by a multi-goal margin most likely.

factors.factor: France -330; perfect group (9pts, 2 conceded), tournament favourite

posted_to.note: R32 pre-bet sweep (whole round biddable). PROTECT mode (rank 1/34, lead +12, rem_grp=0) but k=0.3 => contest pick == EP-max on adjusted track; ~32 KO matches remain so EP-max is right. Winner-scoreline (KO; platform draw odds 0.00). Anchored to de-vigged market.

Re-bet 2:0 -> 1:0 after fixing KO scoring to the community's 'after penalties' rule (a level game resolves to a 1-goal win for the shootout winner). Under the corrected EP model 1:0 beats 2:0 for strong favourites (0-0->pens becomes an exact 1-0). Pre-kickoff, prediction unchanged.

adjusted.reasoning: Norway are the favourites here (-/+105) with Haaland (4 goals already) and were rested for the France dead-rubber; Ivory Coast lack a top-class striker. Norway's games have been high-scoring (5+ goals each). Anchor to market: Norway edge it, draw live.

factors.factor: Norway +105 favourite, -180 to advance; Haaland rested vs France; CIV no elite striker

posted_to.note: R32 pre-bet sweep (whole round biddable). PROTECT mode (rank 1/34, lead +12, rem_grp=0) but k=0.3 => contest pick == EP-max on adjusted track; ~32 KO matches remain so EP-max is right. Winner-scoreline (KO; platform draw odds 0.00). Anchored to de-vigged market.

adjusted.reasoning: Mexico won Group A with nine points and have not conceded; they get altitude/home advantage in Mexico City and extra rest, while Ecuador have been toothless (scoreless run, struggled vs Germany/Ivory Coast). Nudge Mexico just above market on the home/defence edge.

factors.factor: Mexico +110 home, 9pts & 0 conceded, MexicoCity altitude; Ecuador attacking struggles

odds.source: FanDuel 2026-06-30 (MEX +110/draw +220/ECU +270); Mexico home/altitude, not conceded; Ecuador toothless
